equations: du/dt=M*lap(mu)+R+act, dv/dt=D_v*lap(v)-R+feed; R=kp_eff*v*chi(u)-kd*chi(u)^2, kp_eff=kp*(1+bias_eps*bias_field) (mechanism-a足場、role=S、依頼Cでmechanism-cはfalsified); act=-f_str*(0.3+prog)*furrow*chi(u) 各連結成分ごとに独立、現在のaspect>閾値のときのみ自動武装(記憶なし)
solver: pseudo-spectral, semi-implicit CH + implicit diffusion, per-component furrow + growth bias, chemostat feed
